title: Totem_of_undying
description: The mod adds a crafting recipe so you can create the totem using materials. When you hold the Totem of Undying and receive fatal damage, it saves you once and then disappears.
body:
The Craftable Totem Mod in Minecraft allows players to craft the Totem of Undying instead of only obtaining it by killing an Evoker during raids or in a Woodland Mansion. In the normal game, the Totem cannot be crafted, but this mod adds a special crafting recipe that lets players create it using valuable materials like gold, emeralds, or other rare items depending on the mod version. When the player holds the Totem of Undying in their hand and receives fatal damage, it automatically saves them from death, restores some health, gives temporary effects such as regeneration and fire resistance, and then disappears after use. This mod is popular in survival worlds and multiplayer servers because it makes the Totem renewable and easier to obtain.

Crafting Recipe (3×3 grid):

Top row:
Empty – Diamond – Empty

Middle row:
Gold Block – Emerald Block – Gold Block

Bottom row:
Empty – Gold Block – Empty

After placing the items in this pattern, you will receive 1 Totem of Undying.

Note: The recipe may change depending on the mod version.
